acceptance_criteria: A Rust validator enforces stage presence, handoffs, profile evidence, parent/child links, and changed-path coverage.
CI runs the validator separately from the Rust workspace quality gate.

open_questions.question: Changed-path coverage ignores work-items/ because those artifacts are process metadata rather than target implementation paths.

objective: Design the validator and enforcement path.
design_summary: A shared Rust crate loads work-item directories and validates stage rules.
CI invokes the validator with git-derived changed paths.
public_interface_changes: Add a process-method binary crate to the workspace.
boundary_impacts: Testing fixtures exercise the validator without mutating runtime code.
PR review now expects work item ids and verification summaries.
